channel.title: Fuelin Sessions
channel.description:
Fuelin Sessions explores how to fuel for peak performance, faster recovery, and long-term health with science-backed insights you can trust. Episodes feature leading experts, athletes, and coaches sharing proven fueling strategies for triathletes, runners, cyclists, and all high-performing athletes.
Co-hosted by Fuelin Co-Founder Scott Tindal, former Head of Performance Nutrition for the Toronto Maple Leafs (NHL), America’s Cup, and Pro Rugby, and Jan Frodeno, Olympic gold medalist and 3X IRONMAN World Champion.
Created by Fuelin, the app that simplifies eating for performance - fuelin.com
channel.author: Fuelin
channel.itunes:author: Fuelin
channel.itunes:summary:
Fuelin Sessions explores how to fuel for peak performance, faster recovery, and long-term health with science-backed insights you can trust. Episodes feature leading experts, athletes, and coaches sharing proven fueling strategies for triathletes, runners, cyclists, and all high-performing athletes.
Co-hosted by Fuelin Co-Founder Scott Tindal, former Head of Performance Nutrition for the Toronto Maple Leafs (NHL), America’s Cup, and Pro Rugby, and Jan Frodeno, Olympic gold medalist and 3X IRONMAN World Champion.
Created by Fuelin, the app that simplifies eating for performance - fuelin.com

item.title: Fueling an Athlete's Major Injury Recovery
item.description:
In this episode, Scott is joined by professional triathlete and coach Nicholas Chase. He shares his detailed recovery journey after a hip fracture, emphasizing the critical role of nutrition, mindset, and strategic rehabilitation. They discuss practical insights on injury management, nutritional strategies, and mental resilience from an elite athlete's perspective.

Nicholas Chase Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/race_chase/

⁠⁠⁠Fuelin on Instagram⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠

⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠Check Out The Fuelin App⁠⁠
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
In this episode, Scott is joined by professional triathlete and coach Nicholas Chase. He shares his detailed recovery journey after a hip fracture, emphasizing the critical role of nutrition, mindset, and strategic rehabilitation. They discuss practical insights on injury management, nutritional strategies, and mental resilience from an elite athlete's perspective.

Nicholas Chase Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/race_chase/

⁠⁠⁠Fuelin on Instagram⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠

⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠Check Out The Fuelin App⁠⁠

item.title: Do You Get Old Because You Stop Exercising?
item.description:
In this episode of FuelIn Sessions, Scott Tindall is joined by Dr. David Lipman to explore the intersection of nutrition, exercise, and longevity. The conversation delves into mitochondrial health, the importance of exercise as we age, and the potential of various supplements, including NAD+ precursors and infrared light therapy. Throughout the discussion, the emphasis is on the need for consistency in health habits and the idea that everyone who sweats can be considered an athlete.


Dr David Lipman Links:

Website

Substack Newsletter

Mentioned Blog


⁠⁠⁠Fuelin on Instagram⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠Check Out The Fuelin App⁠

The conversation delves into mitochondrial health, the importance of exercise as we age, and the potential of various supplements, including NAD+ precursors and infrared light therapy. Throughout the discussion, the emphasis is on the need for consistency in health habits and the idea that everyone who sweats can be considered an athlete.

⁠⁠⁠Fuelin on Instagram⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠Check Out The Fuelin App⁠

item.title: Do You Even Need Sodium After Exercise?
item.description:
In this episode, Scott and Dr. Alan McCubbin conclude their discussion on Dr. McCubbin's latest research paper, "Sodium Intake for Athletes." In part 3, they delve into the ongoing debates surrounding carbohydrate intake, the biases present in nutrition research, and the importance of understanding fluid and sodium replacement strategies during and after exercise.



STUDY: McCubbin, A.J.**Sodium intake for athletes before, during and after exercise: review and recommendations. Perform. Nutr. 1, 11 (2025). ⁠⁠https://doi.org/10.1186/s44410-025-00011-9⁠⁠


⁠⁠⁠Fuelin on Instagram⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ ⁠

⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠Check Out The Fuelin App⁠
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
In this episode, Scott and Dr. Alan McCubbin conclude their discussion on Dr. McCubbin's latest research paper, "Sodium Intake for Athletes." In part 3, they delve into the ongoing debates surrounding carbohydrate intake, the biases present in nutrition research, and the importance of understanding fluid and sodium replacement strategies during and after exercise.



STUDY: McCubbin, A.J.**Sodium intake for athletes before, during and after exercise: review and recommendations. Perform. Nutr. 1, 11 (2025). ⁠⁠https://doi.org/10.1186/s44410-025-00011-9⁠⁠

item.title: Is Sodium Actually Required During Exercise
item.description:
In this episode, Scott and Dr. Alan McCubbin continue their discussion on Dr. McCubbin's latest research paper, "Sodium Intake for Athletes." In part 2 they explore common beliefs surrounding sodium intake, the impact of sodium on thirst and muscle cramping, and the risks of hyponatremia.


STUDY: McCubbin, A.J.**Sodium intake for athletes before, during and after exercise: review and recommendations. Perform. Nutr. 1, 11 (2025). ⁠https://doi.org/10.1186/s44410-025-00011-9⁠


⁠⁠Fuelin on Instagram⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ ⁠

⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠Check Out The Fuelin App⁠
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
In this episode, Scott and Dr. Alan McCubbin continue their discussion on Dr. McCubbin's latest research paper, "Sodium Intake for Athletes." In part 2 they explore common beliefs surrounding sodium intake, the impact of sodium on thirst and muscle cramping, and the risks of hyponatremia.


STUDY: McCubbin, A.J.**Sodium intake for athletes before, during and after exercise: review and recommendations. Perform. Nutr. 1, 11 (2025). ⁠https://doi.org/10.1186/s44410-025-00011-9⁠


⁠⁠Fuelin on Instagram⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ ⁠

⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠Check Out The Fuelin App⁠

item.title: Sodium Intake For Athletes: Review and Recommendations Part 1 with Dr. Alan McCubbin
item.description:
In this episode, Scott Tindal and Dr. Alan McCubbin delve into Dr. McCubbin’s latest research paper, which explores the complexities of sodium intake in sports nutrition. They discuss the importance of sodium for hydration, the differences in sodium needs between the general population and athletes, and the implications of sodium intake before exercise. The conversation also covers hyperhydration strategies, the role of sodium in weight manipulation for athletes, and the need for personalized sodium recommendations.


STUDY: McCubbin, A.J.**Sodium intake for athletes before, during and after exercise: review and recommendations. Perform. Nutr. 1, 11 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1186/s44410-025-00011-9



⁠Fuelin on Instagram⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ ⁠

⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠Check Out The Fuelin App⁠
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
In this episode, Scott Tindal and Dr. Alan McCubbin delve into Dr. McCubbin’s latest research paper, which explores the complexities of sodium intake in sports nutrition. They discuss the importance of sodium for hydration, the differences in sodium needs between the general population and athletes, and the implications of sodium intake before exercise. The conversation also covers hyperhydration strategies, the role of sodium in weight manipulation for athletes, and the need for personalized sodium recommendations.


STUDY: McCubbin, A.J.**Sodium intake for athletes before, during and after exercise: review and recommendations. Perform. Nutr. 1, 11 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1186/s44410-025-00011-9



⁠Fuelin on Instagram⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ ⁠

⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠Check Out The Fuelin App⁠

item.title: Health First, Performance After: A Triathlete's Healthy Transformation with Megan Ivers
item.description:
In this episode, Scott interviews Fuelin athlete Megan Ivers, who shares her remarkable journey of transformation through nutrition and performance. They discuss the importance of proper fueling, the role of mindset, and the impact of community support in achieving athletic goals.


⁠Fuelin on Instagram⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ ⁠

⁠⁠⁠⁠Check Out The Fuelin App⁠
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
In this episode, Scott interviews Fuelin athlete Megan Ivers, who shares her remarkable journey of transformation through nutrition and performance. They discuss the importance of proper fueling, the role of mindset, and the impact of community support in achieving athletic goals.


⁠Fuelin on Instagram⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ ⁠

⁠⁠⁠⁠Check Out The Fuelin App⁠

item.title: LLM Food Photos, Caffeine, and Training’s Effect on Body Fat Loss Study Analysis with Brady Holmer
item.description:
In this episode, Scott Tindal and Brady Holmer discuss the accuracy of AI in calorie estimation, caffeine's inability to offset ketogenic performance deficits fully, and findings that aerobic training outperforms concurrent training for reducing body fat.


Studies:


Performance Evaluation of 3 Large Language Models for Nutritional Content Estimation from Food Images

CAFFEINE: Habitual coffee consumption and risk of frailty in later life

Caffeine enhances performance regardless of fueling strategy; however, high carbohydrate availability is associated with improved training speeds compared with ketogenic diet -
⁠Comparison of concurrent, resistance, or aerobic training on body fat loss: a systematic review and meta-analysis. J Int Soc Sports Nutr. 2025


Peter Attia Social Post


Brady's Substack


⁠Fuelin on Instagram⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ ⁠

⁠⁠⁠Check Out The Fuelin App
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:

CAFFEINE: Habitual coffee consumption and risk of frailty in later life

Caffeine enhances performance regardless of fueling strategy; however, high carbohydrate availability is associated with improved training speeds compared with ketogenic diet -
⁠Comparison of concurrent, resistance, or aerobic training on body fat loss: a systematic review and meta-analysis. J Int Soc Sports Nutr. 2025


Peter Attia Social Post


Brady's Substack


⁠Fuelin on Instagram⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ ⁠

⁠⁠⁠Check Out The Fuelin App

item.title: From RED-S to Resilience: An Athlete's Journey Back to Joy & Performance
item.description:
In this episode of FuelIn Sessions, Scott Tindal sits down with triathlete Magda Mayer to discuss her pivot from gymnastics to triathlon. Magda opens up about navigating toxic sports cultures, overcoming anorexia, the critical role of therapy in recovery, and how Fuelin helped her learn why fueling—not restricting—is the true secret to athletic performance.

⁠Fuelin on Instagram⁠⁠⁠⁠ ⁠

⁠⁠Check Out The Fuelin App
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
In this episode of FuelIn Sessions, Scott Tindal sits down with triathlete Magda Mayer to discuss her pivot from gymnastics to triathlon. Magda opens up about navigating toxic sports cultures, overcoming anorexia, the critical role of therapy in recovery, and how Fuelin helped her learn why fueling—not restricting—is the true secret to athletic performance.

⁠Fuelin on Instagram⁠⁠⁠⁠ ⁠

⁠⁠Check Out The Fuelin App

item.title: DEXA, RMR & Pre-Test Prep: Improving Testing Accuracy with Dr. Alan McCubbin
item.description:
In this episode of the podcast, Scott is joined by Dr. Alan McCubbin to discuss the intricacies of resting metabolic rate (RMR) and DEXA scans. They explore a recent study that examines the impact of dietary and exercise manipulation on RMR and DEXA results, emphasizing the importance of standardization in testing procedures, and explore their significance in assessing body composition and athlete health. 


Study: https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/39283225/

⁠Fuelin on Instagram⁠⁠⁠ ⁠

⁠Check Out The Fuelin App
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:

They explore a recent study that examines the impact of dietary and exercise manipulation on RMR and DEXA results, emphasizing the importance of standardization in testing procedures, and explore their significance in assessing body composition and athlete health. 


Study: https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/39283225/

⁠Fuelin on Instagram⁠⁠⁠ ⁠

⁠Check Out The Fuelin App

item.title: The Female Endurance Athlete's Guide To Fat: Examining Fat, Fuel & Health with Megan Foley
item.description:
In this episode, Scott is joined by Megan Foley, and they delve into the often-overlooked macronutrient, fat. They discuss its importance for endurance athletes, the differences in fat requirements between genders, and the implications of dietary fat on performance and health.


Fuelin on Instagram⁠⁠ ⁠

Check Out The Fuelin App
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
In this episode, Scott is joined by Megan Foley, and they delve into the often-overlooked macronutrient, fat. They discuss its importance for endurance athletes, the differences in fat requirements between genders, and the implications of dietary fat on performance and health.


Fuelin on Instagram⁠⁠ ⁠

Check Out The Fuelin App

item.title: Does Your Hourly Carb Ingestion Timing Matter: Insights from the 90g/h Study with Dr Alan McCubbin
item.description:
In this episode, Scott is joined by Dr. Alan McCubbin to discuss a study examining the effects of different carbohydrate ingestion patterns on physiological responses and performance in cycling. The study found no significant differences in performance between small, frequent carbohydrate feeds and larger, less frequent feeds. Scott and Alan emphasize the importance of personalization in fueling strategies for endurance athletes and highlight the need for further research in this area.


Study: https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/40489306/

Fuelin on Instagram⁠ ⁠
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
In this episode, Scott is joined by Dr. Alan McCubbin to discuss a study examining the effects of different carbohydrate ingestion patterns on physiological responses and performance in cycling. The study found no significant differences in performance between small, frequent carbohydrate feeds and larger, less frequent feeds. Scott and Alan emphasize the importance of personalization in fueling strategies for endurance athletes and highlight the need for further research in this area.


Study: https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/40489306/

Fuelin on Instagram⁠ ⁠

item.title: Substrate Oxidation Does Not Influence Middle Distance Running Performance: A Randomised Controlled Crossover Trial with Brady Holmer
item.description:
In this episode, Scott is joined by Brady Holmer to discuss the impact of substrate oxidation on running performance, focusing on a recent study comparing high-carbohydrate and low-carbohydrate diets. They explore the implications of the study's findings, the importance of metabolic flexibility, and the limitations of the research design.


Study: https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/full/10.1111/sms.70132?campaign=woletoc

Brady's Substack

Fuelin on Instagram ⁠

Learn more about the Fuelin app

item.title: Maurten Sodium Bicarb System: Boosting Performance Without GI Distress with Dr. Andy Sparks & Jan Frodeno
item.description:
In this episode of FuelIn Sessions, Scott & Jan Frodeno are joined by Dr. Andy Sparks of Maurten to talk about their Sodium Bicarb System. They dig into the science of nutrition for endurance athletes, discuss Andy Sparks's journey in nutritional science, the transition from academia to industry, and the importance of sodium bicarbonate and carbohydrate intake in enhancing athletic performance.

⁠⁠Follow Fuelin on Instagram⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠

Learn more about the Fuelin app:⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ ⁠https://www.fuelin.com⁠
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
In this episode of FuelIn Sessions, Scott & Jan Frodeno are joined by Dr. Andy Sparks of Maurten to talk about their Sodium Bicarb System. They dig into the science of nutrition for endurance athletes, discuss Andy Sparks's journey in nutritional science, the transition from academia to industry, and the importance of sodium bicarbonate and carbohydrate intake in enhancing athletic performance.

Learn more about the Fuelin app:⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ ⁠https://www.fuelin.com⁠

item.title: Falling Into the Off-Season: Recover, Refuel, Reset with Matt Hanson & Rae Harris
item.description:
In this episode, Scott Tindal discusses the importance of the off-season for endurance athletes with Matt Hanson and Rae Harris of Humango.AI. They explore strategies for recovery, the physiological and psychological aspects of taking time off, and how to maintain fitness during downtime. The conversation also covers the significance of strength training and nutrition strategies during the holidays. 

⁠⁠Follow Fuelin on Instagram⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠

Learn more about the Fuelin app:⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ ⁠https://www.fuelin.com⁠
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:

They explore strategies for recovery, the physiological and psychological aspects of taking time off, and how to maintain fitness during downtime. ⁠⁠Follow Fuelin on Instagram⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠

Learn more about the Fuelin app:⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ ⁠https://www.fuelin.com⁠

item.title: The Female Endurance Athlete's Protein Guide: Examining Protein & Performance with Megan Foley
item.description:
In this episode, Scott Tindal and Megan Foley discuss the protein requirements for endurance athletes, with a focus on the differences between male and female athletes. They explore the importance of protein for recovery, the impact of the menstrual cycle on protein needs, and the significance of maintaining adequate protein intake during caloric deficits. 

⁠⁠Follow Fuelin on Instagram⁠⁠⁠⁠

Learn more about the Fuelin app:⁠⁠⁠⁠ ⁠https://www.fuelin.com⁠
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:

They explore the importance of protein for recovery, the impact of the menstrual cycle on protein needs, and the significance of maintaining adequate protein intake during caloric deficits. 

⁠⁠Follow Fuelin on Instagram⁠⁠⁠⁠

Learn more about the Fuelin app:⁠⁠⁠⁠ ⁠https://www.fuelin.com⁠

item.title: The Next Generation of Fueling Precision: Examining Fuelin's Algo V2
item.description:
In this episode of FuelIn Sessions, Scott Tindal and Dr. Alan McCubbin discuss the exciting launch of Algorithm V2. They dig into how the new algorithm enhances personalization for a diverse range of athletes, allowing users to input specific thresholds and account for physical activity outside of training. The conversation highlights the introduction of the Smart Meals feature, which simplifies meal planning, and the importance of AI tracking for accurate nutritional data.


⁠Follow Fuelin on Instagram⁠⁠⁠

Learn more about the Fuelin app:⁠⁠⁠ ⁠https://www.fuelin.com⁠
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:

They dig into how the new algorithm enhances personalization for a diverse range of athletes, allowing users to input specific thresholds and account for physical activity outside of training. The conversation highlights the introduction of the Smart Meals feature, which simplifies meal planning, and the importance of AI tracking for accurate nutritional data.


⁠Follow Fuelin on Instagram⁠⁠⁠

Learn more about the Fuelin app:⁠⁠⁠ ⁠https://www.fuelin.com⁠

item.title: Fueling the 70.3 Distance: Inside the Nutrition Plan of 5x World Champion Daniela Ryf
item.description:
In this episode, Scott is joined by five-time 70.3 World Champion Daniela Ryf to discuss the intricacies of race nutrition, particularly for the 70.3 distance. They explore the differences between 70.3 and Ironman racing, the importance of carb loading, and strategies for race-day breakfast and bike nutrition.


Follow Fuelin on Instagram⁠⁠

Learn more about the Fuelin app:⁠⁠ ⁠https://www.fuelin.com⁠
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
In this episode, Scott is joined by five-time 70.3 World Champion Daniela Ryf to discuss the intricacies of race nutrition, particularly for the 70.3 distance. They explore the differences between 70.3 and Ironman racing, the importance of carb loading, and strategies for race-day breakfast and bike nutrition.


Follow Fuelin on Instagram⁠⁠

Learn more about the Fuelin app:⁠⁠ ⁠https://www.fuelin.com⁠

item.title: Road to Kona Episode 4: Finishing 6th at Ironman World Championships with Holly Lawrence
item.description:
In this episode, Scott and Holly Lawrence unpack her 6th-place finish at the Ironman World Championship in Kona. Holly reflects on her race day experience, including the challenges she faced and the emotions of crossing the finish line. They explore Holly's race preparation, lessons learned from previous races, heat acclimation strategies, and the importance of nutrition and hydration.


Follow Fuelin on Instagram⁠

Learn more about the Fuelin app:⁠ ⁠https://www.fuelin.com⁠
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:

item.title: Fueling for the Full Distance A Pro's Race Strategy with Nick Staggenborg & Frederic Funk
item.description:
In this episode of the podcast, Scott is joined by Managing Director of Pushing Limits, Nick Staggenborg, and Professional Triathlete Frederic Funk. They discuss Fred's full-distance triathlon debut at Challenge Roth, his fueling strategy, and how it was to race the new distance. They also briefly discuss the new Pushing Limits integration with the Fuelin app as a part of the newly announced German version of the app!

https://pushing-limits.de

https://humango.ai/


Follow Fuelin on Instagram

Learn more about the Fuelin app: ⁠https://www.fuelin.com⁠
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:

item.title: Challenging the "More Carbs is Better" Dogma with Dr. Alan McCubbin
item.description:
In this conversation Scott & Dr. Alan McCubbin discuss the intricacies of personalized carbohydrate intake for athletes, exploring how individual oxidation rates can inform optimal fueling strategies. The discussion highlights the variability in carbohydrate needs based on power output, the impact of gastrointestinal symptoms on performance, and the potential benefits of gut training.

Listen to more Fuelin Sessions podcasts here: ⁠https://open.spotify.com/show/3PsMjMjt1MtZBm2URL5c8n⁠Follow Fuelin on Instagram: ⁠www.instagram.com/getfuelin ⁠ Learn more about the Fuelin app: ⁠https://www.fuelin.com⁠
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
In this conversation Scott & Dr. Alan McCubbin discuss the intricacies of personalized carbohydrate intake for athletes, exploring how individual oxidation rates can inform optimal fueling strategies. The discussion highlights the variability in carbohydrate needs based on power output, the impact of gastrointestinal symptoms on performance, and the potential benefits of gut training.

Listen to more Fuelin Sessions podcasts here: ⁠https://open.spotify.com/show/3PsMjMjt1MtZBm2URL5c8n⁠Follow Fuelin on Instagram: ⁠www.instagram.com/getfuelin ⁠ Learn more about the Fuelin app: ⁠https://www.fuelin.com⁠

item.title: Fueling World Records and Defying Age: A 70-Year-Old Ultra-Cyclist's Blueprint with Jeff Seckendorf
item.description:
In this conversation, Scott is joined by Jeff Seckendorf, who shares about his remarkable journey of breaking four world records in ultra cycling at the age of 70. They discuss his transition to cycling and the meticulous planning and execution that led to his record-breaking achievements. Jeff emphasizes the importance of nutrition, training, and mental resilience, particularly how he overcame challenges related to overtraining and weight management.


Follow Fuelin on Instagram: ⁠⁠⁠www.instagram.com/getfuelin ⁠⁠ ⁠ Learn more about the Fuelin app: ⁠⁠⁠https://www.fuelin.com⁠⁠⁠
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
In this conversation, Scott is joined by Jeff Seckendorf, who shares about his remarkable journey of breaking four world records in ultra cycling at the age of 70. They discuss his transition to cycling and the meticulous planning and execution that led to his record-breaking achievements. Jeff emphasizes the importance of nutrition, training, and mental resilience, particularly how he overcame challenges related to overtraining and weight management.


Follow Fuelin on Instagram: ⁠⁠⁠www.instagram.com/getfuelin ⁠⁠ ⁠ Learn more about the Fuelin app: ⁠⁠⁠https://www.fuelin.com⁠⁠⁠

item.title: Nutrition, Supplements & Foundational Fueling A Champion Triathlete's Verdict with Daniela Ryf
item.description:
In this conversation, Scott Tindal and Daniela Ryf explore the essential aspects of nutrition and supplementation for athletes, particularly focusing on the unique needs of women over 35. They discuss the importance of food as the foundation of nutrition, the role of various supplements like omega-3s, vitamin D3, iron, magnesium, and probiotics, and the significance of gut health.


Follow Fuelin on Instagram: ⁠⁠www.instagram.com/getfuelin ⁠ ⁠ Learn more about the Fuelin app: ⁠⁠https://www.fuelin.com⁠⁠
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
In this conversation, Scott Tindal and Daniela Ryf explore the essential aspects of nutrition and supplementation for athletes, particularly focusing on the unique needs of women over 35. They discuss the importance of food as the foundation of nutrition, the role of various supplements like omega-3s, vitamin D3, iron, magnesium, and probiotics, and the significance of gut health.


Follow Fuelin on Instagram: ⁠⁠www.instagram.com/getfuelin ⁠ ⁠ Learn more about the Fuelin app: ⁠⁠https://www.fuelin.com⁠⁠

item.title: Heat Acclimation, Hydration, and Hormones: A Female Physiology Deep Dive with Dr. Lindsey Hunt
item.description:
In this episode of Fuel In Sessions, Scott Tindal and Dr. Lindsay Hunt discuss the critical aspects of heat acclimation for athletes, particularly focusing on women. They explore the definitions of acclimatization and acclimation, the best practices for preparing for heat, and the importance of safety and monitoring during heat training.

Follow Fuelin on Instagram: ⁠www.instagram.com/getfuelin ⁠ Learn more about the Fuelin app: ⁠https://www.fuelin.com⁠
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
In this episode of Fuel In Sessions, Scott Tindal and Dr. Lindsay Hunt discuss the critical aspects of heat acclimation for athletes, particularly focusing on women. They explore the definitions of acclimatization and acclimation, the best practices for preparing for heat, and the importance of safety and monitoring during heat training.

Follow Fuelin on Instagram: ⁠www.instagram.com/getfuelin ⁠ Learn more about the Fuelin app: ⁠https://www.fuelin.com⁠

item.title: Episode 27: The Science of Alcohol & Ketones: Examining Their Effects on Health and Training with Brady Holmer
item.description:
In this conversation, Scott is joined by Brady Holmer, where they discuss the interplay between alcohol consumption, exercise, and overall health. They emphasize the importance of moderation in drinking, the impact of alcohol on sleep and heart health, and the role of wearable technology in monitoring health metrics. The discussion also delves into the science of ketones, their potential benefits for performance and recovery, and the misconceptions surrounding supplements like creatine.


https://www.physiologicallyspeaking.com/



Listen to more Fuelin Sessions podcasts here: https://open.spotify.com/show/3PsMjMjt1MtZBm2URL5c8n

Follow Fuelin on Instagram: www.instagram.com/getfuelin

Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com

In this conversation, Scott is joined by Brady Holmer, where they discuss the interplay between alcohol consumption, exercise, and overall health. They emphasize the importance of moderation in drinking, the impact of alcohol on sleep and heart health, and the role of wearable technology in monitoring health metrics. The discussion also delves into the science of ketones, their potential benefits for performance and recovery, and the misconceptions surrounding supplements like creatine.

item.title: Episode 26: 3:05hr Marathon Fueling: A complete fueling & training breakdown with Jan Frodeno
item.description:
In this episode, Scott and Jan talk through the intricacies of fueling for endurance sports, focusing on Scott's recent marathon experience. They explore the impact of high-carb versus high-fat diets, the importance of personalized nutrition strategies, and the significance of pre-race fueling. The conversation also explores training volume, post-race recovery, and the importance of enjoyment in the training process.


Listen to more Fuelin Sessions podcasts here: https://open.spotify.com/show/3PsMjMjt1MtZBm2URL5c8nFollow Fuelin on Instagram: www.instagram.com/getfuelin Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
In this episode, Scott and Jan talk through the intricacies of fueling for endurance sports, focusing on Scott's recent marathon experience. They explore the impact of high-carb versus high-fat diets, the importance of personalized nutrition strategies, and the significance of pre-race fueling. The conversation also explores training volume, post-race recovery, and the importance of enjoyment in the training process.


Listen to more Fuelin Sessions podcasts here: https://open.spotify.com/show/3PsMjMjt1MtZBm2URL5c8nFollow Fuelin on Instagram: www.instagram.com/getfuelin Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com

item.title: Episode 25 Nutrition Across the Ages: The Evolution of Sports Nutrition with Matt Dixon
item.description:
In this conversation, Matt Dixon and Scott Tindal explore the evolution of nutrition in endurance sports, sharing personal experiences and insights on hydration, recovery, and the importance of a balanced approach to training and nutrition. 


Follow Fuelin on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/getfuelin

Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com

item.itunes:summary:

Follow Fuelin on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/getfuelin

Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com

item.title: Episode 24: From Hyrox to Marathon: A 'regular' athlete's nutrition journey with Fuelin with Matt Longden
item.description:
In this conversation, Scott Tindal interviews Matt Longdon, a Fuelin user and endurance athlete based in London. Matt shares his journey from powerlifting to endurance sports, discussing the challenges of balancing family life with training. He reflects on his experiences with ultra marathons, the importance of nutrition and fueling strategies, and the lessons learned from his races.


Follow Fuelin on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/getfuelin

Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com

He reflects on his experiences with ultra marathons, the importance of nutrition and fueling strategies, and the lessons learned from his races.


Follow Fuelin on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/getfuelin

Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com

item.title: Episode 23 - Running Western States with Chris Myers and Precision Fuel & Hydration
item.description:
Running 100 miles is no easy feet, but Chris Myers conquered it with the help of a detailed nutrition and hydration plan he worked through with Precision Fuel & Hydration. In this episode we talk it all through.

Cimoro nutrition pack: https://cimoro.com/

Western States crewing video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UDBsOiY8WUg

Chris’ full case study from Western States: https://www.precisionhydration.com/athletes/case-studies/running/chris-myers/28-06-2025/

Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://fuelin.com
item.dc:creator: Fuelin

item.title: Episode 22 - Fueling For Recovery: Navigating Nutrition During Injury with Jan Frodeno
item.description:
In this episode, Scott Tindal and Jan Frodeno delve into the critical aspects of nutrition and fueling strategies for athletes, particularly during the off-season and injury recovery phases.

They discuss the importance of maintaining energy needs, the role of macronutrients, and the significance of supplements in muscle repair and inflammation control. The dialogue emphasizes the necessity of consistency in nutrition over perfection, highlighting that recovery is an active process requiring adequate caloric intake. The conversation also touches on the evolving understanding of protein timing and the metabolic demands placed on the body during recovery.

Follow Fuelin on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/getfuelin Learn more about the Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
In this episode, Scott Tindal and Jan Frodeno delve into the critical aspects of nutrition and fueling strategies for athletes, particularly during the off-season and injury recovery phases.

They discuss the importance of maintaining energy needs, the role of macronutrients, and the significance of supplements in muscle repair and inflammation control. The dialogue emphasizes the necessity of consistency in nutrition over perfection, highlighting that recovery is an active process requiring adequate caloric intake. The conversation also touches on the evolving understanding of protein timing and the metabolic demands placed on the body during recovery.

Follow Fuelin on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/getfuelin Learn more about the Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com

item.title: Episode 21 - Female Nutrition: Carbohydrates & the Menstrual Cycle with Megan Foley
item.description:
In this episode Megan and Scott dive into all things carbohydrates and the female body. From why they are important to why & how Fuelin prescribe them to ensure health is never ignored. They also discuss whether at different times in the cycle carbohydrate needs of females increase.

Follow Fuelin on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/getfuelin Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
In this episode Megan and Scott dive into all things carbohydrates and the female body. From why they are important to why & how Fuelin prescribe them to ensure health is never ignored. They also discuss whether at different times in the cycle carbohydrate needs of females increase.

Follow Fuelin on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/getfuelin Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com

item.title: Road to Kona Pt 3 with Holly Lawrence: Holly did an IRONMAN!
item.description:
The road to Kona continues as Holly did an IRONMAN at Lake Placid! In this episode Scott & Holly discuss how it went, her fueling and what lies ahead... Is Kona calling?

Listen to find out how Holly found it and whether she felt following her result.

Follow Fuelin on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/getfuelin

Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
The road to Kona continues as Holly did an IRONMAN at Lake Placid! In this episode Scott & Holly discuss how it went, her fueling and what lies ahead... Is Kona calling?

Listen to find out how Holly found it and whether she felt following her result.

Follow Fuelin on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/getfuelin

Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com

item.title: Episode 20 - Conquering Unbound as a visually impaired cyclist with David Lutzy and guide, Yannick Banville
item.description:
In this inspiring episode of Fuelin Sessions, Scott sits down with David Lutzy, a visually impaired ultra-endurance cyclist, and Yannick Banville, an elite Canadian cyclist (and guide to David), to talk about their incredible journey through Unbound Gravel 200 — one of the toughest gravel races in the world.

David, a former member of the Canadian wingsuiting team, shares his powerful story of resilience and vision loss due to histoplasmosis. Guided by Yannick, who is no stranger to extreme endurance events like the Transcontinental Race, the duo takes on 200 miles of rugged Kansas terrain — and finishes strong in just over 12 hours.

Follow Fuelin on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/getfuelin

Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
In this inspiring episode of Fuelin Sessions, Scott sits down with David Lutzy, a visually impaired ultra-endurance cyclist, and Yannick Banville, an elite Canadian cyclist (and guide to David), to talk about their incredible journey through Unbound Gravel 200 — one of the toughest gravel races in the world.

David, a former member of the Canadian wingsuiting team, shares his powerful story of resilience and vision loss due to histoplasmosis. Guided by Yannick, who is no stranger to extreme endurance events like the Transcontinental Race, the duo takes on 200 miles of rugged Kansas terrain — and finishes strong in just over 12 hours.

Follow Fuelin on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/getfuelin

Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com

item.title: Episode 18 - All Things Triathlon with Jan Frodeno and Kyle Smith
item.description:
Host, Jan Frodeno and T100 Triathlon Pro, Kyle Smith catch up on this week's Fuelin Sessions podcast to talk all things triathlon. From prioritising health, to what's the motivation, to tricks & tips from the trade, Jan & Kyle cover it all.

Follow Fuelin on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/getfuelin

Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com

item.itunes:summary:

Follow Fuelin on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/getfuelin

Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com

item.title: Episode 19 - Are BCAAs Bullsh*t with Professor Stuart Phillips
item.description:
Professor Stuart Phillips is back on the podcast and this time talking with Scott about BCAAs aka Branch Chain Amino Acids. There is a lot of hype around BCAAs however are they worth it? Listen to find out.

Follow Fuelin on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/getfuelin Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
Professor Stuart Phillips is back on the podcast and this time talking with Scott about BCAAs aka Branch Chain Amino Acids. There is a lot of hype around BCAAs however are they worth it? Listen to find out.

Follow Fuelin on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/getfuelin Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com

item.title: ROTH SPECIAL: Challenge Roth Preparation with Frederic Funk & Daniela Ryf
item.description:
It is Challenge Roth race week so it is only right that we bring you a podcast with Fuelin athlete, Frederic Funk & Challenge Roth Champion, Daniela Ryf. Frederic is preparing for his first long distance triathlon so we hear all about his final preparations, how fueling has changed and what to expect on the big day.

Follow Fuelin on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/getfuelin

Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com

#Fuelin #FuelinSessions #FredericFunk #TriathlonFueling #ChallengeRoth

Frederic is preparing for his first long distance triathlon so we hear all about his final preparations, how fueling has changed and what to expect on the big day.

Follow Fuelin on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/getfuelin

Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com

#Fuelin #FuelinSessions #FredericFunk #TriathlonFueling #ChallengeRoth

item.title: Episode 17 - The World Champion Fueling Formula with Daniela Ryf
item.description:
On the Fuelin Sessions podcast this week, we are joined again by Fuelin CFO, Chief Fueling Officer, and 10x World Champion, Daniela Ryf, to talk all things triathlon fueling, most importantly how she fueled multiple world championship titles.

From how she used to train fasted to understanding how many carbs per hour she needed to perform at her best over the longer distance, tune in to listen to her fueling formula.

Follow Fuelin on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/getfuelin

Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
On the Fuelin Sessions podcast this week, we are joined again by Fuelin CFO, Chief Fueling Officer, and 10x World Champion, Daniela Ryf, to talk all things triathlon fueling, most importantly how she fueled multiple world championship titles.

From how she used to train fasted to understanding how many carbs per hour she needed to perform at her best over the longer distance, tune in to listen to her fueling formula.

Follow Fuelin on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/getfuelin

Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com

item.title: Episode 16 - FODMAPs, gut health and performance in high carbohydrate diets: Diving Into The Research with Alan McCubbin
item.description:
Dr Alan McCubbin and Scott Tindal are back to take a dive into the research again. This time the focus is on carbohydrate loading protocol, FODMAPs and their role on performance & gut health.

Follow Fuelin on Instagram: www.instagram.com/getfuelin Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
Dr Alan McCubbin and Scott Tindal are back to take a dive into the research again. This time the focus is on carbohydrate loading protocol, FODMAPs and their role on performance & gut health.

Follow Fuelin on Instagram: www.instagram.com/getfuelin Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com

item.title: Episode 15 - 70.3 Race Nutrition and more Triathlon nutrition with Jan Frodeno
item.description:
In this latest episode of the Fuelin Sessions, hosts Scott Tindal and Jan Frodeno are back together to talk all things triathlon training nutrition with a focus on 70.3 race nutrition. So join this triathlon legend for a discussion you won't want to miss.

Follow Fuelin on Instagram: https://instagram.com/getfuelin

Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
In this latest episode of the Fuelin Sessions, hosts Scott Tindal and Jan Frodeno are back together to talk all things triathlon training nutrition with a focus on 70.3 race nutrition. So join this triathlon legend for a discussion you won't want to miss.

Follow Fuelin on Instagram: https://instagram.com/getfuelin

Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com

item.title: Episode 14 - Tendon Health & Collagen Supplementation with Dr. Keith Baar & Dr. Alec Avey
item.description:
In this episode of Fuelin Sessions, Scott Tindal is joined by two leading voices in tendon and connective tissue science: Dr. Keith Baar, renowned researcher and pioneer in muscle and tendon adaptation, and Dr. Alec Avey, an emerging expert from UC Davis.

Together they explore:

  • What causes tendon pain & how to treat it

  • Isometrics vs. Eccentrics: What works best?

  • Overcoming vs. Yielding isometrics in rehab

  • Collagen supplements — form, timing, dosing

  • Top nutrition strategies to support tendon healing

  • Protein, creatine, HMB, vitamin C, omega-3s & more

Whether you're an athlete, coach, or clinician, this episode delivers science-backed strategies you can apply today.

Learn more about the Fuelin app at: www.fuelin.com
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
In this episode of Fuelin Sessions, Scott Tindal is joined by two leading voices in tendon and connective tissue science: Dr. Keith Baar, renowned researcher and pioneer in muscle and tendon adaptation, and Dr. Alec Avey, an emerging expert from UC Davis.

Together they explore:

  • What causes tendon pain & how to treat it

  • Isometrics vs. Eccentrics: What works best?

  • Overcoming vs. Yielding isometrics in rehab

  • Collagen supplements — form, timing, dosing

  • Top nutrition strategies to support tendon healing

  • Protein, creatine, HMB, vitamin C, omega-3s & more

Whether you're an athlete, coach, or clinician, this episode delivers science-backed strategies you can apply today.

Learn more about the Fuelin app at: www.fuelin.com

item.title: Episode 13 - Female athlete nutrition compared with dietician Megan Foley
item.description:
In this episode Fuelin Coaches, Scott Tindal & Megan Foley, talk about how nutrition for female and male athletes compare and where the science is now. They discuss the research gap between men and women right now but also whether this is massive problem in the world of nutrition.

In this first show of the series, Megan and Scott then focus on carbohydrate consumption for females across their lifespan.

Check out the Follow Fuelin on Instagram: https://instagram.com/getfuelin

Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
In this episode Fuelin Coaches, Scott Tindal & Megan Foley, talk about how nutrition for female and male athletes compare and where the science is now. They discuss the research gap between men and women right now but also whether this is massive problem in the world of nutrition.

In this first show of the series, Megan and Scott then focus on carbohydrate consumption for females across their lifespan.

Check out the Follow Fuelin on Instagram: https://instagram.com/getfuelin

Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com

item.title: Episode 12 - Carbohydrate Loading: Diving Into The Research with Alan McCubbin
item.description: In this episode, Scott Tindal and Alan McCubbin discuss the implications of carbohydrate loading for endurance athletes. They focus on a 2002 study that examined the effectiveness of a one-day versus three-day carbohydrate loading protocol. They explore the study's findings on muscle glycogen storage, the relevance of these findings for both male and female athletes, and the practical considerations for implementing carbohydrate loading strategies.
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary: In this episode, Scott Tindal and Alan McCubbin discuss the implications of carbohydrate loading for endurance athletes. They focus on a 2002 study that examined the effectiveness of a one-day versus three-day carbohydrate loading protocol. They explore the study's findings on muscle glycogen storage, the relevance of these findings for both male and female athletes, and the practical considerations for implementing carbohydrate loading strategies.

item.title: Episode 11 - Periodized Nutrition, the N=1 Experiment with Marco Altini
item.description: In this latest episode of Fuelin Sessions, Scott Tindal is joined by Marco Altini to talk about his experience with nutrition periodization after losing 11kg in 7 weeks through caloric deficit and macronutrient adjustments. They cover the need for protein, balanced diet and also specific diets and how they could affect your own biometrics, such as HRV. Marco is a runner, scientist and developer mainly working at the intersection between health, technology and performance. He has a PhD in Data Science and a MSc in Computer Science Engineering as well as another MSc in Human Movement Sciences. In 2012, he started HRV4Training to help many athletes monitor their biometrics. Follow Fuelin on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/getfuelin Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary: In this latest episode of Fuelin Sessions, Scott Tindal is joined by Marco Altini to talk about his experience with nutrition periodization after losing 11kg in 7 weeks through caloric deficit and macronutrient adjustments. They cover the need for protein, balanced diet and also specific diets and how they could affect your own biometrics, such as HRV. Marco is a runner, scientist and developer mainly working at the intersection between health, technology and performance. He has a PhD in Data Science and a MSc in Computer Science Engineering as well as another MSc in Human Movement Sciences. In 2012, he started HRV4Training to help many athletes monitor their biometrics. Follow Fuelin on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/getfuelin Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com

item.title: Episode 10 - Fueling for Women: Health, Hormones & the Everyday Athlete with Daniela Ryf
item.description:
In our latest episode Scott Tindal catches up with 10x World Champion Triathlete, Daniela Ryf to talk Fueling for Women: Health, Hormones & the Everyday Athlete.

Daniela Ryf has recently joined the team as CFO - Chief Fuelin Officer.

Follow Fuelin on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/getfuelin/Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
In our latest episode Scott Tindal catches up with 10x World Champion Triathlete, Daniela Ryf to talk Fueling for Women: Health, Hormones & the Everyday Athlete.

Daniela Ryf has recently joined the team as CFO - Chief Fuelin Officer.

Follow Fuelin on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/getfuelin/Learn more about the Fuelin app: https://www.fuelin.com

item.title: Road to Kona with Holly Lawrence - Episode 2: Injury setbacks
item.description:
We are back with part 2 of the Road to Kona series with IRONMAN 70.3 World Champ, Holly Lawrence.

In this episode, we hear about how postpartum return to training has created a small setback and how she has overcome this to get back on track to reach her goal of qualifying for the Big Island in October.

Stay tuned for part 3.
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
We are back with part 2 of the Road to Kona series with IRONMAN 70.3 World Champ, Holly Lawrence.

In this episode, we hear about how postpartum return to training has created a small setback and how she has overcome this to get back on track to reach her goal of qualifying for the Big Island in October.

Stay tuned for part 3.

item.title: Episode 9 - Is Keto King? Dr. Dan Plews joins to discuss all.
item.description:
It's time to face the demons and discuss the Keto diet. Jan and Scott are joined by Dr. Dan Plews to discuss in depth this topic and how / if it could be beneficial for health.

The Keto diet is a high-fat, very low-carbohydrate diet that aims to induce a metabolic state called ketosis, where the body burns fat for fuel instead of carbohydrates.

Let us know your Keto experiences in the comments and any tips for Scott right now?
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
It's time to face the demons and discuss the Keto diet. Jan and Scott are joined by Dr. Dan Plews to discuss in depth this topic and how / if it could be beneficial for health.

The Keto diet is a high-fat, very low-carbohydrate diet that aims to induce a metabolic state called ketosis, where the body burns fat for fuel instead of carbohydrates.

Let us know your Keto experiences in the comments and any tips for Scott right now?

item.title: Episode 8 - The latest science of carbs discussed with Dr. Alan McCubbin
item.description:
In this episode host, Scott Tindal, is joined by fellow Fuelin Coach, Dr. Alan McCubbin, to discuss in depth three latest studies on carbohydrates. Are carbs dead? Listen to find out.

The Three Studies Discussed

STUDY 1: Carbohydrate Ingestion Eliminates Hypoglycemia & Improves Endurance Exercise Performance in Triathletes Adapted to Very Low & High Carbohydrate Isocaloric Diets.

STUDY 2: Delaying post-exercise carbohydrate intake impairs next-day exercise capacity but not muscle glycogen or molecular responses.

⁠https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/epdf/10.1111/apha.14215⁠

STUDY 3: Should we recommend in-session carbs in g/hr or g/kg/hr?
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
In this episode host, Scott Tindal, is joined by fellow Fuelin Coach, Dr. Alan McCubbin, to discuss in depth three latest studies on carbohydrates. Are carbs dead? Listen to find out.

The Three Studies Discussed

STUDY 1: Carbohydrate Ingestion Eliminates Hypoglycemia & Improves Endurance Exercise Performance in Triathletes Adapted to Very Low & High Carbohydrate Isocaloric Diets.

STUDY 2: Delaying post-exercise carbohydrate intake impairs next-day exercise capacity but not muscle glycogen or molecular responses.

⁠https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/epdf/10.1111/apha.14215⁠

STUDY 3: Should we recommend in-session carbs in g/hr or g/kg/hr?

item.title: Episode 7 - Protein for Endurance Athletes with Professor Stuart Philips
item.description:
We are excited to be joined by Stuart Philips in episode 7 to talk all things protein, requirements for all and the importance of its role especially for endurance athletes.

Stuart Phillips is a Distinguished University Professor. His research is focused on the impact of nutrition and exercise on human skeletal muscle protein turnover. He is also keenly interested in diet- and exercise-induced changes in body composition.

He currently has more than 33,000 career citations and 400 original scientific research and review papers.

Learn more about Fuelin at www.fuelin.com
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
We are excited to be joined by Stuart Philips in episode 7 to talk all things protein, requirements for all and the importance of its role especially for endurance athletes.

Stuart Phillips is a Distinguished University Professor. His research is focused on the impact of nutrition and exercise on human skeletal muscle protein turnover. He is also keenly interested in diet- and exercise-induced changes in body composition.

He currently has more than 33,000 career citations and 400 original scientific research and review papers.

Learn more about Fuelin at www.fuelin.com

item.title: Episode 6 - Extreme Diets. Vegan to Carnivore, are these diets sustainable for athletes?
item.description:
In episode 6, Scott Tindal and Jan Frodeno are back to discuss extreme diets and how they could impact your athletic performance.

From the science and personal experience the pair discuss the full spectrum from veganism to the carnivore diet. We hope you enjoy.

For more information about Fuelin head to www.fuelin.com
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
In episode 6, Scott Tindal and Jan Frodeno are back to discuss extreme diets and how they could impact your athletic performance.

From the science and personal experience the pair discuss the full spectrum from veganism to the carnivore diet. We hope you enjoy.

For more information about Fuelin head to www.fuelin.com

item.title: Road to Kona with Holly Lawrence - Episode 1
item.description:
That is right, Holly is targeting Kona in 2025! We will be bringing you exclusive chats with Holly and Scott throughout the year around how comeback post pregnancy, her training load and nutrition to be in IRONMAN shape and how it is to now be Mom to Poppy.


In episode 1 we cover Holly getting fit again postpartum, how her body has changed and what is the plan of attack to ensure she is at peak fitness come October 2025.


Learn more about Fuelin and how personalized nutrition can help you achieve your goals at: https://www.fuelin.com
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
That is right, Holly is targeting Kona in 2025! We will be bringing you exclusive chats with Holly and Scott throughout the year around how comeback post pregnancy, her training load and nutrition to be in IRONMAN shape and how it is to now be Mom to Poppy.


In episode 1 we cover Holly getting fit again postpartum, how her body has changed and what is the plan of attack to ensure she is at peak fitness come October 2025.


Learn more about Fuelin and how personalized nutrition can help you achieve your goals at: https://www.fuelin.com

item.title: Episode 5 - Offseason Nutrition & Training
item.description:
In episode 5, Scott and Jan talk all things offseason. From how they personally structure it to discussing weight gain & reduced fitness. The topics they cover are aimed at giving light to how some of the best in sport approach these months and hopefully add some guidance to these often uncomfortable and confusing, yet very important, months of the year.

Learn more about Fuelin and how personalized nutrition can help you achieve your goals at: https://www.fuelin.com
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
In episode 5, Scott and Jan talk all things offseason. From how they personally structure it to discussing weight gain & reduced fitness. The topics they cover are aimed at giving light to how some of the best in sport approach these months and hopefully add some guidance to these often uncomfortable and confusing, yet very important, months of the year.

Learn more about Fuelin and how personalized nutrition can help you achieve your goals at: https://www.fuelin.com

item.title: Episode 4 - Travel & Nutrition. How to fuel when you are on the go.
item.description:
In Episode 4, Scott and Jan answer questions from the community around how to fuel and what to do when you are traveling. From long haul flights to what to eat in a new place, they cover it all.

Learn more about Fuelin and how personalized nutrition can help you achieve your goals at: https://www.fuelin.com
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
In Episode 4, Scott and Jan answer questions from the community around how to fuel and what to do when you are traveling. From long haul flights to what to eat in a new place, they cover it all.

Learn more about Fuelin and how personalized nutrition can help you achieve your goals at: https://www.fuelin.com

item.title: Episode 3 - Getting healthy, embracing carbs and reducing injury, the Fuelin story with Sarah Piampiano
item.description:
In Episode 3, Scott is joined by multiple IRONMAN Champion and Fuelin athlete 0, Sarah Piampiano.

Sarah and Scott talk about how when they started working together Sarah barely ate any carbs, was struggling with GI issues and didn't have a regular menstrual cycle. This completely changed!!! Throughout the episode they cover everything they trailed to not only improve health and performance but also what felt best for Sarah to be a happy athlete.

Learn more about Fuelin and how personalized nutrition can help you achieve your goals at: https://www.fuelin.com
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
In Episode 3, Scott is joined by multiple IRONMAN Champion and Fuelin athlete 0, Sarah Piampiano.

Sarah and Scott talk about how when they started working together Sarah barely ate any carbs, was struggling with GI issues and didn't have a regular menstrual cycle. This completely changed!!! Throughout the episode they cover everything they trailed to not only improve health and performance but also what felt best for Sarah to be a happy athlete.

Learn more about Fuelin and how personalized nutrition can help you achieve your goals at: https://www.fuelin.com

item.title: KONA SPECIAL - Hear it all from the GOATs mouth!
item.description:
We couldn't not be on the Big Island without a Fuelin Sessions special on all things Kona.

Especially when Scott is joined by not only his usual Co-Host and 5x World Champion & Olympic Gold Medalist, Jan Frodeno, but also 10x World Champion, Daniela Ryf, joined the chat to ensure no volcano rock was left unturned.

From nutrition, to managing the heat, to racing stories, Daniela, Jan & Scott cover it all.

We are currently running a Kona special where both the Autopilot plan and Copilot plan are reduced, check it out at www.fuelin.com/lp/kona2024
item.dc:creator: Fuelin

We couldn't not be on the Big Island without a Fuelin Sessions special on all things Kona.

Especially when Scott is joined by not only his usual Co-Host and 5x World Champion & Olympic Gold Medalist, Jan Frodeno, but also 10x World Champion, Daniela Ryf, joined the chat to ensure no volcano rock was left unturned.

From nutrition, to managing the heat, to racing stories, Daniela, Jan & Scott cover it all.

We are currently running a Kona special where both the Autopilot plan and Copilot plan are reduced, check it out at www.fuelin.com/lp/kona2024

item.title: Episode 2 - Race nutrition. How to prepare and execute when it matters.
item.description:
Welcome back to episode of the Fuelin Session podcast.

In this discussion Jan & Scott talk through how you can best prepare for an event with carbohydrate loading and why nailing you race day fueling is so important. Of course, Jan throws in some stories from his racing days and Scott shares the science.

Learn more about Fuelin and how personalized nutrition can help you achieve your goals at: https://www.fuelin.com
item.dc:creator: Fuelin
item.itunes:summary:
Welcome back to episode of the Fuelin Session podcast.

In this discussion Jan & Scott talk through how you can best prepare for an event with carbohydrate loading and why nailing you race day fueling is so important. Of course, Jan throws in some stories from his racing days and Scott shares the science.

Learn more about Fuelin and how personalized nutrition can help you achieve your goals at: https://www.fuelin.com

item.title: Episode 1 - Low Energy Availability [LEA], what is it and why is it important?
item.description:
Welcome to Fuelin Sessions hosted by Scott Tindal and Jan Frodeno.


In episode 1, Scott and Jan discuss low energy availability [LEA] and how it can be detrimental to athletes. From injuries to health complications to how to overcome it, we hope you enjoy our opening chat.


Learn more about Fuelin and how personalized nutrition can help you achieve your goals at: https://www.fuelin.com
